name: caliber-car-service
description: Caliber Car Service — luxury black car service marketing site (static).

scripts.build:og: python3 -m venv .venv-og 2>/dev/null; .venv-og/bin/pip install -q cairosvg && .venv-og/bin/python -c "import cairosvg; cairosvg.svg2png(url='og-image.svg', write_to='og-image.png', output_width=1200, output_height=630)"
